notes: WS8B latency measurements are slot state machine overhead (warmup stub prevents real Core ML prediction execution in WS8B).
WS8C confirms real predictions complete (coreml_prediction_completed: true) but overlap=0% due to sequential interleaved test design.
Overlap requires concurrent execution (threads/async). Single-threaded A-then-B interleaving cannot produce measurable overlap.
macOS 26.5 coremlcompiler produces .modelc wrapper around .mlmodelc -- requires symlink for compatibility.
install_apple_tri_lane does not populate CoreML executable input/output bindings from manifest (fixed in throughput test).
